source.title: PETKIT verified product data foundation
source.scope: PETKIT internal automatic self-cleaning cat litter box and smart care add-on comparison

litterBoxFamily.heading: The self-cleaning litter box family
litterBoxFamily.body: Three PETKIT litter boxes in one category. Pick the size, format, and smart features that fit your home.

products.name: Pura Max 2
products.description: Balanced enclosed self-cleaning litter care with a 200 mm low entry, 2.4GHz Wi-Fi, app visibility, 35 dB operation, and 11 safety sensors.

image.alt: Pura Max 2 self-cleaning cat litter box with cat

specs.label: Waste caveat
specs.value: Up to 15 days for one-cat households; varies by use and weather

specs.label: Odor control
specs.value: Sealed waste bin + K3 smart spray + N50 2.0 deodorizer

specs.label: Litter
specs.value: Most clumping litter; avoid crystal litter and particles over 12 mm

products.fit: Best fit for owners who want the main automatic litter routine, 2.4GHz app visibility, low entry comfort, and verified caveats instead of camera or medical claims.

products.name: Purobot Max Pro 2
products.description: Camera-assisted litter care for richer multi-cat identity and event visibility, with a larger 8L waste bin and dual-band Wi-Fi.

image.alt: Purobot Max Pro 2 automatic litter box

specs.label: Waste caveat
specs.value: Up to 17 days for one-cat households; varies by use and environment

specs.label: Camera
specs.value: AI camera for identity and image-based routine visibility

specs.label: Health caveat
specs.value: Behavior/image monitoring only; not veterinary diagnosis

products.fit: Best fit when camera visibility, multi-cat identity, a larger waste bin, and 2.4/5GHz connectivity matter more than the lower entry of Pura Max 2.

products.name: Purobot Crystal Duo
products.description: Open-top format with the lowest entry in this comparison and a PETKIT proprietary crystal tray workflow.

image.alt: Purobot Crystal Duo automatic litter box

specs.label: Litter
specs.value: PETKIT Crystal Litter tray only; not regular litter

specs.label: Health caveat
specs.value: Image/routine monitoring only; no disease claim

products.fit: Best fit for low-entry access or a disposable PETKIT Crystal Litter tray routine, with the proprietary tray constraint clearly stated.

ecosystem.heading: Complete the Smart Cat Care ecosystem
ecosystem.body: Pair self-cleaning litter care with smart feeding and fresh water in one connected PETKIT routine.

products.name: YumShare Solo
products.description: Smart feeding support with a 3L dry-food container, scheduled meals, 1080p camera check-ins, night vision, and two-way audio.

specs.label: Audio
specs.value: Two-way audio; voice call up to 20 seconds

specs.label: Food type
specs.value: Dry or freeze-dried food only; max 12 mm kibble

specs.label: Model caveat
specs.value: Confirm Solo vs Solo 2 before publishing Wi-Fi band

products.fit: Use as the feeding add-on for scheduled dry-food meals and remote check-ins after the litter routine is introduced.

products.name: Eversweet Max 2
products.description: Cordless filtered hydration support with 3L capacity, a 5000 mAh battery, 26 dB operation, motion sensing, and app monitoring.

specs.label: Variant caveat
specs.value: No UVC claim unless UVC variant is confirmed

products.fit: Use as the cordless hydration add-on in the broader PETKIT care loop without implying a UVC feature unless the exact variant is confirmed.

useCaseComparison.heading: Choose by household need
useCaseComparison.body: Pura Max 2 stays as the main product. The other PETKIT models clarify the upgrade or alternative path inside the PETKIT litter box lineup.
rows: 76L interior, 7L waste bin, low 200 mm entry, 2.4GHz Wi-Fi, quiet 35 dB operation, and no camera premium.
AI camera features, 12 sensors, 8L waste bin, 2.4/5GHz Wi-Fi, and image-based routine visibility without medical diagnosis wording.
Lowest entry and disposable crystal tray workflow
Open-top design, 180 mm entry, 2.4/5GHz Wi-Fi, and a PETKIT Crystal Litter tray workflow for a different maintenance preference.
useCaseComparison.note: Hands-free duration, warranty, pricing, health-related features, and product variants depend on market, purchase date, number of cats, usage frequency, environment, and local distributor confirmation.

safe: Official physical specs and model codes.
Hands-free claims when paired with the one-cat/use/weather caveat.
Odor-control mechanisms without promising zero odor or percentage reduction.
App usage, image monitoring, weight logs, and routine visibility without medical diagnosis wording.
Pura Max 2 Wi-Fi stated as 2.4GHz only.
Eversweet Max 2 non-UVC positioning unless a UVC variant is explicitly confirmed.
needsCaveat: Warranty outside the US or any local Vietnam warranty duration.
FLUTD/UTI early-detection claims for Purobot Max Pro 2 and Purobot Crystal Duo AI camera - rephrase as behavior/image monitoring only.
Crystal Duo warranty duration because sources vary between 6 and 12 months.
YumShare Solo Wi-Fi band because Solo and Solo 2 differ; confirm exact model before publishing Wi-Fi spec.
Eversweet Max 2 UVC or non-UVC variant; confirm exact variant before showing any UVC badge/text.
Odor percentage claims unless tied to approved PETKIT lab wording.
Pricing, because it changes by market and date.
doNotUse: Unverified superlatives such as best in market or safest.
Odor-free, 100% safe, or absolute leak-proof claims.
Medical diagnosis, prevention, disease detection, FLUTD detection, UTI detection, or treatment claims.
Statements that Pura Max 2 has AI camera features.
Statements that Pura Max 2 works with all litter types.
2-year warranty badge on any product listing (not yet verified for Vietnam market).
UVC badge on Eversweet Max 2 unless product variant is confirmed as the UVC model.
Market share, number of households, shipping, or local warranty claims without a source.
